prompt: forge a spec for adding a WebSocket-based real-time dashboard to our Django REST Framework API. We need live-updating charts showing API request rates, error rates, and response times. The data is in PostgreSQL and we're deployed on AWS ECS.
assertions: The researcher agent was spawned (mentions spawning, Task tool, or specsmith:researcher)
The researcher was given a specific output path for research notes
Context7 or library documentation lookup was attempted in parallel
Research notes contain library comparison tables
Research notes contain a risk assessment section
Interview questions were asked and agent stopped to wait
